# Retrospective: Title

## Date
YYYY-MM-DD

## Scope
What pass, spike, or milestone does this cover?

## What changed
- What actually landed?

## What worked
- What paid off?

## What hurt
- What created drag, confusion, or rework?

## What got clarified
- Which decisions or assumptions are now sharper?

## Doc updates needed
- Which roadmap, ADR, glossary, or feature docs should change?

## Next pass
- What should happen immediately after this?
